# Tone of Voice

## Default Tone

- professional
- collaborative
- forward-looking
- supportive
- action-oriented
- transparent
- solution-focused

## Language Stance

- use a personal and approachable voice rather than distant corporate language
- use informal `Du` by default in direct communication
- use straightforward greetings and closings such as "Hallo" and "Bis dann" in informal exchanges
- switch to formal salutations and closings when the communication context requires it

## Communication Rules

### Professional and Formal

Keep reports, offers, letters of intent, and partner correspondence crisp and professional.

### Collaborative and Supportive

Emphasize cooperation, partnership, and mutual benefit. Offer help and invite dialogue instead of broadcasting one-way conclusions.

### Action-Oriented and Transparent

Make progress, outcomes, next steps, and needed support explicit rather than implied.

### Innovative and Solution-Focused

Position technology as a practical means to create local value, not as abstraction for its own sake.

### Encouraging and Engaging

In direct communication, keep the voice constructive, approachable, and open to feedback and collaboration.
